phases.name: Rust backend reads additional MCP config files

steps.name: Add mcp_files field and read new sources
steps.description: Extend ClaudeConfig with mcp_files vec. Read ~/.claude.json (user scope), .mcp.json (project scope), and plugin .mcp.json using existing read_optional_file. Wire through merge_configs and empty_config.
criteria: Frontend receives an mcp_files collection from the IPC config call
User scope reads ~/.claude.json when present; absent produces empty
Plugin scan reads .mcp.json from each plugin directory
Reading both scopes returns MCP file entries from all sources combined

phases.name: TypeScript domain aggregates MCP servers from all sources

steps.name: Add source attribution and aggregate MCP files
steps.description: Add source field to McpServerConfig. Add mcpFiles to RawClaudeConfig. Create aggregateMcpFiles function that parses each mcp file entry via extractMcpServers, annotates with scope/source. Extend extractMcpServers to accept and return source attribution. Merge into aggregateConfig output.
criteria: Each aggregated MCP server identifies the file it originated from
MCP servers from all sources appear in aggregated config output
Each server carries correct scope (user/project/plugin) and source
Empty, missing, or malformed mcp files produce no servers and no crash

steps.name: Display source origin in MCP server cards
steps.description: Show source file origin on MCP server list items and detail panel so users can identify where each server is configured. Update empty state to reference all config locations.
criteria: Each MCP server card shows the source file that defines it
Servers from all config sources render without layout issues
Empty state message references all discoverable config locations
